description_long: This is a small, rustic wooden cabin with dark timber plank siding and a gently curved, gambrel-style roof covered in dark shingles. The front facade features a single, centered rectangular doorway and a small, diamond-shaped window above it, adding a touch of character. The side walls each have two symmetrically placed, square-paned windows with wooden frames, allowing natural light to enter the interior. The cabin sits on a low, concrete or stone foundation, providing stability and a slight elevation from the ground. The overall appearance is simple and functional, with a weathered, natural finish that blends well into both rural and urban park settings. There are no visible porches or decorative elements, emphasizing practicality and straightforward design.
description: A small, rustic wooden cabin with a curved gambrel roof, centered front door, and symmetrical side windows. The dark wood and simple design evoke a cozy, utilitarian feel.
description_view_0: Front view shows a centered rectangular doorway and a small diamond-shaped window above, with dark wood siding and a gambrel roof.
description_view_1: Side view reveals two symmetrically placed, square-paned windows and the full length of the curved roof, with no doors or additional features.
description_view_2: Rear view is visually identical to the front, with the same doorway and diamond window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing two square-paned windows and the continuous gambrel roof.
attribute_roof_type: gambrel roof with a gentle curve, covered in dark shingles and moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Four square-paned windows, two on each side wall, symmetrically arranged in pairs with wooden frames
attribute_door_placement: Single rectangular door centered on the front facade beneath the diamond window
